user_story: As a Manager, I want to filter out time requests by period, status, employee class and department, so that I can find the requests relevant to me
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Out Time Request screen; When I set period, status, employee class or department and click Search; Then only matching out time requests are listed

user_story: As a Manager, I want to filter by statuses such as Pending with me, Approved, Rejected, Cancelled and Taken, so that I can track each stage of an out time request
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Out Time Request screen; When I select the Pending with me status; Then only requests awaiting my action are displayed

user_story: As a Manager, I want to assign an out time request on behalf of an employee, so that I can record their out time when needed
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Out Time Request screen; When I click Assign out time request and submit the details; Then a new out time request is created and listed

user_story: As a Manager, I want to see request type, from/to dates, number of days and hours per request, so that I can assess the out time details before deciding
acceptance_criteria: Given out time requests exist; When the grid loads; Then columns for employee code, employee name, employee class, request type, from date time, to date, number of days, number of hours and status are shown

user_story: As a Manager, I want to approve or reject out time requests via the Task column, so that employees get a timely decision
acceptance_criteria: Given an out time request is pending; When I act on the Task column; Then the request status is updated to Approved or Rejected

user_story: As a Manager, I want to reset filters and refresh the list, so that I can clear criteria and reload current requests
acceptance_criteria: Given I have applied filters; When I click Reset or refresh; Then the filters clear and the list reloads
